statement: AMD Q1 2026 Data Center segment revenue was $5.8 billion, up 57% year over year and about 7% sequentially, driven by EPYC and the Instinct GPU ramp.
why: Strong Data Center growth reflects rising demand for AMD EPYC CPUs and Instinct accelerators, though Instinct is not separately broken out.

impact.mechanism: 57% YoY Data Center growth and the Instinct ramp indicate accelerating AMD accelerator demand.

evidence.source: AMD Q1 2026 financial results press release (Form 8-K)
evidence.excerpt: Data Center segment revenue was $5.8 billion, up 57% year-over-year, driven by strong demand for AMD EPYC processors and the continued ramp of AMD Instinct GPU shipments

confidence.basis: secondary (StockTitan) summary of AMD 8-K; Instinct not separately broken out
